rationales.hook_strength: 'Tired by 3pm' nails the audience pain point and 'morning light' is a concrete, unexpected fix — loses a point because the payoff isn't quantified or punchy enough to feel urgent.
rationales.clarity: Every slide is a single actionable idea with zero fluff — the cloudy-day objection slide is especially good at preempting excuses.
rationales.audience_fit: Speaks directly to the busy, crash-prone 20–35 crowd with dead-simple instructions and no overwhelming science dump.
rationales.novelty: Morning light and circadian rhythm are well-trodden wellness TikTok territory — the 'coffee before light borrows energy' framing is the only genuinely fresh angle.
rationales.brand_fit: Hedged claims ('can support'), no hypey language, CTA ties directly to the Health Score product without being pushy — exactly the right voice.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential from the objection-handling structure and the walk-stack tip, but the novelty ceiling will cap reach unless the cover visual is strong enough to stand out in a crowded niche.
